_comment: Google Cloud Storage configuration for Healix Vault
_instructions: 1. Set 'enabled' to true to activate GCS sync
2. Set 'bucket_name' to your GCS bucket name (e.g. my-vault-backup)
3. Set 'object_name' to the file path in the bucket (default: vault.dat)
4. Set 'service_account_key' to the path of your downloaded Service Account JSON key file
- Create a Service Account with the role 'Storage Object Admin'
- Download the JSON key and place it next to this file
- Set the path below (use forward slashes or double backslashes)
